work_item.file_need: Structured final P2P summary for the authorization file after the completed peer-to-peer discussion.

local_memo.message: Please close the PET MPI peer-to-peer work item using current case, policy, evidence, P2P, and authorization records in the Northstar environment. If the final determination is adverse, calculate the internal appeal deadline using the plan's 180-day internal appeal window from the final adverse determination date.
